nasb.text: and her two sons, of whom one was named Gershom, for Moses said, “I have been a sojourner in a foreign land.”

esv.text: along with her two sons. The name of the one was Gershom (for he said, “I have been a sojourner in a foreign land”),

cnv.text: 又帶著西坡拉的兩個兒子，一個名叫革舜，因為摩西說：“我在異地作了客旅”；

ccb.text: 摩西的两个儿子一个叫革舜，因为摩西说：“我成了在异乡寄居的人”；
